title: AuthorizationStrategy.JWT

title: AuthorizationStrategy.SAS
text: Shared Access Signature (SAS) token-based authorization. SAS token is sent in the Authorization header of each request. Client is responsible for refreshing the SAS token before it expires. val SAS: AuthorizationStrategy

title: LocationFilterConfig.burstWindow

title: LocationFilterConfig.filterDebug

title: LocationFilterConfig.kalmanProfile

title: LocationFilterConfig.maxBurstDistance

title: LocationFilterConfig.maxImpliedSpeed

title: LocationFilterConfig.odometerAccuracyThreshold

title: LocationFilterConfig.policy

title: LocationFilterConfig.rollingWindow
text: Number of samples in the rolling window used for burst averaging. Defaults to . Valid range: 3–20. Higher values produce smoother averaged locations but introduce greater latency in responsiveness to  var rollingWindow: Int

title: LocationFilterConfig.trackingAccuracyThreshold
text: Maximum acceptable horizontal accuracy in meters for a sample to qualify for tracking. Defaults to meters. Valid range: 0–500. Locations with an accuracy value greater (worse) than this threshold are  var trackingAccuracyThreshold: Double

title: LocationFilterConfig.useKalman
text: Enables the Kalman filter to smooth incoming location speed and position. Defaults to . When enabled, the SDK applies a Kalman filter to reduce noise and stabilize velocity and distance calculations. var useKalman: Boolean

title: LocationFilterPolicy.Adjust

title: LocationFilterPolicy.Conservative
text: Aggressive — filters heavily, preferring stability over responsiveness. val Conservative: LocationFilterPolicy

title: LocationFilterPolicy.PassThrough
